faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my College Point home?
faqs.answer: Signs include small irregular holes in wool, silk, or fur garments, silken tubes or cases in closets, adult moths flying near wardrobes, and webbing in fabric folds. You may also notice larvae (small caterpillars) on clothing or carpets. Our technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm clothes moth activity and identify the species affecting your home.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth treatment cost in College Point?
